description: Color photograph, outdoor, of the Frances Perkins Department of Labor Building in Washington, D.C. on a clear blue-sky day. The mid-century concrete federal building is decorated as follows: a very large American flag hangs vertically on the right facade, a tall flagpole flies the U.S. flag at half-staff in the center foreground, red-white-and-blue bunting decorates the lower level, and at left a large vertical banner bears a portrait of President Donald Trump with text including 'AMERICA 250' and 'AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST.' Engraved on the building's entablature is 'FRANCES PERKINS DEPARTMENT OF LABOR BUILDING.' A tree and entrance steps are in the foreground. The posted image is a photograph of the building. The flag flies at half-staff. The tweet text reads 'Our resolve is stronger than ever ... we will never give up our fight.' The post dates to Sept. 12, 2025.
notable_text: AMERICA 250 | AMERICAN WORKERS FIRST (on banner) | FRANCES PERKINS DEPARTMENT OF LABOR BUILDING (engraved)
